common.tagline: Get paid in seconds. Not weeks.

checkout.title: Pay {amount} to {vendor}
checkout.notABank: Klaro is not a bank. Testnet preview — no real money moves.

receipt.embedHint: Drop <KlaroReceiptBadge> on any site to embed.

cashout.title: Cashout
cashout.inrPilotBadge: INR pilot · simulated proof, no real INR moves

webhooks.title: Webhook endpoints
webhooks.description: Receive signed POSTs when invoices change state, cashouts settle, or refunds execute.
webhooks.secretHelp: Verify Klaro-Signature header by recomputing HMAC-SHA256 over `{t}.{rawBody}`

recurring.title: Recurring invoices
recurring.description: Auto-create invoices on a schedule. Useful for subscriptions, retainers, repeat customers.

bulk.title: Bulk import
bulk.description: Upload a CSV to create up to 1,000 invoices at once.

bills.title: Bills
bills.description: Pay incoming USDC bills. Goes live with the bill-pay flow in M9.
bills.comingSoon: Bill-pay is wired in M9 — accept-and-pay reverse direction.

footer.disclosure: Klaro is not a bank. Testnet preview. No real money moves.
